name: RStudio Codespace
postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R rstudio:rstudio /home/rstudio/project && cp -r /home/rstudio/project/core/rstudio-settings/rstudio-prefs.json /home/rstudio/.config/rstudio/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -r /home/rstudio/project/core/rstudio-settings/themes/* /home/rstudio/.config/rstudio/themes/ 2>/dev/null || true
